use_codes.desc: PROPHYLAXIS OF ORGAN REJECTION IN PATIENTS RECEIVING ALLOGENEIC RENAL TRANSPLANTS

indications.text:
1.1 Prophylaxis of Organ Rejection in Kidney Transplant
Myfortic® (mycophenolic acid) is indicated for the prophylaxis of organ rejection in adult patients receiving a kidney
transplant.
Myfortic is indicated for the prophylaxis of organ rejection in pediatric patients 5 years of age and older who a...

Myfortic® (mycophenolic acid) delayed-release tablets are indicated for the prophylaxis of
organ rejection in patients receiving allogeneic renal transplants, administered in combination
with cyclosporine and corticosteroids.
